type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
flare operating hours reduced from 71.8 days in 2021 to 48 in 2022

large increase in erosion this could be due to the increase in average wind velocity from 14.9 m/s to 15.9 m/s, could also be due to a much larger number of hours breaking the threshold friction velocity

reduction in emissions from unpaved roads could be due to the reduction in total trips taken this year to 16,605 from 19,853. in addition to this, the weighted mass of all vehicles also decreased this year to 15.9 from 23.5
